methodology.qualityGate: Exact paired harm probability: one-sided 95% Clopper-Pearson upper bound below 2 percentage points.
methodology.costGate: QCV total modeled provider cost at least 25% below Headroom-only, with paired-bootstrap 95% lower bound also at least 25%.
methodology.headroom: Pinpoint runtime with QCV and optical disabled; semantic tool-result compression delegated to the local Headroom sidecar.
methodology.qcv: Pinpoint deterministic exact prefetch enabled; model-driven fallback, semantic compression, and optical compression disabled.
methodology.limitation: Synthetic controlled structured tasks. This is inferential live-model evidence, not organic production-traffic or external-adoption evidence.
